top_signals.title: Traders Curb Bets for ECB Hikes to Less Than a Quarter Point
top_signals.summary: Traders are reappraising the scope for the European Central Bank to lift interest rates as sliding oil prices reduce the risks of sticky inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Kazakhstan Cuts Gas Output after Drone Strike on Russian Processing Plant
top_signals.summary: Kazakhstan has slashed by a quarter natural gas production at the huge Karachaganak oil and gas field after Ukraine earlier this week hit with drones a Russian plant processing part of the gas, Kazakhstan’s Energy Minister Yerlan Akkenzhenov said on Friday.  “Naturally, we have reduced the gas intake,” Reuters quoted the minister as telling reporters today.   Gas supply to Kazakhstan hasn’t been disrupted, Akkenzhenov added.  Oil production at Karachaganak, which is operated by international supermajors,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Boeing Wins Jet Deal From China Southern Valued at $3.62 Billion
top_signals.summary: Boeing Co. secured an order from China Southern Airlines Co. valued at $3.62 billion, marking an important win for the US manufacturer after seeing orders dry up from Asia’s largest aviation market in the past decade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
top_signals.summary: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
